channel.title: Prebuilt Configs on MCP Toolbox for Databases
channel.description: Recent content in Prebuilt Configs on MCP Toolbox for Databases

item.title: MySQL
item.description:
MySQL

  • --prebuilt value: mysql
  • Environment Variables:
    • MYSQL_HOST: The hostname or IP address of the MySQL server.
    • MYSQL_PORT: The port number for the MySQL server.
    • MYSQL_DATABASE: The name of the database to connect to.
    • MYSQL_USER: The database username.
    • MYSQL_PASSWORD: The password for the database user.
  • Permissions:
    • Database-level permissions (e.g., SELECT, INSERT) are required to execute queries.
  • Tools:
    • execute_sql: Executes a SQL query.
    • list_tables: Lists tables in the database.
    • get_query_plan: Provides information about how MySQL executes a SQL statement.
    • list_active_queries: Lists ongoing queries.
    • list_tables_missing_unique_indexes: Looks for tables that do not have primary or unique key contraint.
    • list_table_fragmentation: Displays table fragmentation in MySQL.
    • list_table_stats: Displays table statistics in MySQL.
